'''Bear''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Bear was [[Jedi training/Legends|instructed]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and eventually was possessed of such knowledge and understanding that he was granted the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Serving the Order dutifully, Master Bear was selected to become an [[Jedi instructor|instructor]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], teaching Climbing and Ropework classes after his nomination was accepted by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]].<ref name="YDR" />

When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Master Bear was one of a few instructors who remained at the Temple, while many others went to serve as [[Jedi General/Legends|Generals]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. A well-respected instructor, [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] himself often recommended this class; many [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiates]] questioned the need for such a class, though often looked back on their lessons with appreciation.<ref name="YDR" />
